Class Ship

java.lang.Object
  greenfoot.Actor
      Ship

public class Ship
extends greenfoot.Actor

A class that represents a players ship. The ship can fire weapons and move about the screen. Should a collision occur between the ship and an enemy the ship will destroy itself.

Author:
Bretton Murphy

          Create a ship

Method Detail

act

public void act()
Act - do whatever the Ship wants to do. This method is called whenever the 'Act' or 'Run' button gets pressed in the environment.
